title: [Bug]: Incompatible result with MySQL
poc:
CREATE TABLE t1 (
    c0 TIMESTAMP,
    c1 DOUBLE,
    c2 TIMESTAMP AS (c0) VIRTUAL NOT NULL,
    c3 INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    c4 VARCHAR(255),
    c5 JSON,
    PRIMARY KEY (c3),
    UNIQUE INDEX idx1 (c2, c0),
    INDEX idx2 (c4)
) WITH COLUMN GROUP (all columns, each column);

INSERT IGNORE INTO t1(c1, c3, c4, c5) 
VALUES 
    (-10.0, 2900, 'example', '{"key": "value"}'),
    (232.0, 3921, 'test', '{"key": "test"}'),
    (12222.0, 2123, 'demo', '{"key": "demo"}');
key_bug_features: Inconsistent JSON handling in query conditions
bug_features_seed:
CREATE TABLE t2 (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(100),
    value DOUBLE,
    data JSON,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
INSERT INTO t2 (id, name, value, data) VALUES (1, 'item1', 10.5, '{"field": "data1"}'), (2, 'item2', NULL, '{"field": "data2"}'), (3, 'item3', -5.0, NULL);
SELECT id, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.field')) AS field_value FROM t2 WHERE value IS NULL OR value < 0;
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.field')) = 'data1' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
